component.name: Clippy
component.summary: A native, privacy-first clipboard manager for GNOME

description.p: Clippy is a lightweight and modern clipboard manager built specifically for GNOME and Linux. Written natively in Rust using GTK4 and libadwaita, it integrates seamlessly into the GNOME desktop environment, following the GNOME Human Interface Guidelines.

ul.li: Automatically captures copied text and image history
Vibrant light/dark themes supporting system accent colors
Native drag-and-drop support for pasting text and files directly into other apps
Configurable global shortcut with an interactive key recorder
Always-on-top window pinning to float above other applications
Secure and private local SQLite database storage

screenshot.caption: The main clipboard history list displaying text and image preview cards.
The preferences panel showing shortcut, autostart, and limit configurations.

ul.li: System accent color integration and light/dark styling
Local history SQLite storage with custom limits
